arts.ttl: Barca and the game of football both lose as Getafe earn an ugly draw
arts.sum: Hopefully, the Barcelona players can learn from the experience for the next time they have to play the handful of teams who match the profile of Getafe, but it’s also important to put this one behind them and move on. No one wants to watch that, and if it’s allowed to continue within the rules of the game, the future of the sport is at risk.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star confirms he was racially abused during Getafe draw
arts.sum: Barcelona star Alejandro Balde has on Saturday evening confirmed his plans to file a complaint, after being subjected to racial abuse during the club’s meeting with Getafe. Barca, of course,…

arts.ttl: Stat: Hansi Flick’s Barcelona are the 2nd worst in La Liga in last 20 years
arts.sum: A damning statistic, highlighting the woes of Barcelona in La Liga at present, has late on Saturday come to the fore online. This, of course, comes after Barca endured something…

arts.ttl: ‘Very frustrating’ - Kounde speaks out on Barca’s draw
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Jules Kounde admitted it was a “very frustrating” night for his team once again at Getafe. It’s a shame that we got a draw.

arts.ttl: ‘Different rules’ – Barcelona fans highlight Real Madrid precedent after non-penalty award vs Getafe
arts.sum: Supporters of Barcelona have on Saturday evening moved to highlight what they feel was a major injustice stemming from the club’s meeting with Getafe. Barca, of course, were back in…

arts.ttl: Getafe 1-1 Barcelona: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Catalan giants continue to struggle in La Liga
arts.sum: Barcelona's La Liga struggles continue, with the Catalan outfit being held to a 1-1 draw by Getafe at Estadio Coliseum on Saturday night.

arts.ttl: La Liga side confirm plan to sign Barcelona star in January window
arts.sum: Girona director Quique Carcel dropped a major hint over his plan to sign Eric Garcia this month. The Catalan side have been linked with a renewed move for Garcia despite rising transfer in him interest from Serie A. arts.ttl: Barcelona fans continue to take aim at one player during Getafe clash
arts.sum: Barcelona’s supporters have on Saturday once more moved to make clear their frustrations with a leading member of Hansi Flick’s squad. The player in question? Robert Lewandowski. Barcelona of course…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star recreated teammate’s trademark celebration vs Getafe
arts.sum: Barcelona star Jules Koundé on Saturday evening paid tribute to teammate Pedri. This came after the midfielder was responsible for creating Barca’s opening goal during their La Liga meeting with…

arts.ttl: Photos: Barcelona star’s sensational defence-splitting pass vs Getafe
arts.sum: Still shots of the latest moment of brilliance conjured up by Barcelona star Pedri on Saturday evening have come to the fore online. And they go at least some way…
